details.effect: [fanfare] If Overflow is active for you, select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 4 damage. (Overflow becomes active if your maximum number of play points is at least 7.)

details.cardSet: Starter Deck #4 “Wrath of the Greatwyrm” Worlds Beyond Dragoncraft Starter Set
details.effect: Ward. (This follower can be engaged when it's put onto your field or during your end phase. When followers with Ward are engaged, your opponent can only attack them.) [fanfare] If Overflow is active for you, give this follower [attack]+2/[defense]+2.
